title: centaurium muehlenbergii f. albiflorum
intro: Centaurium muehlenbergii f. albiflorum, also known as White-centred Jewelweed, is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Centaurium muehlenbergii plant, native to North America. The medicinal properties of Centaurium muehlenbergii f. albiflorum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions and wounds. Centaurium muehlenbergii f. albiflorum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with the herbal preparation of choice depending on the intended use and personal preference.
